raw.subject: Your Nebraska detailing page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed your Black Angus heritage shines through in the photos of your mobile detailing work. Glossing those classic cars must be a labor of love.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving potential customers who prefer a dedicated site for booking and inquiries on the table.

I sketched a simple homepage idea from your Facebook posts, including a services overview and photo gallery. You can see it here:

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/gloss-n-glow-mobile-auto-spa-omaha-omaha

If you're interested in learning more about bringing your business online with a straightforward project, I'd love to discuss details in a quick call or reply to this email to get started.
